channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS

item.title: 藏师傅的 HTML Slides 模板确实是非常精美 字里行间还有恰到好处的动效 把这个网址发给你的 Agent 安装即可： https://t.co/Bg1ziVFyeC https://t.co/...
item.description:
藏师傅的 HTML Slides 模板确实是非常精美 字里行间还有恰到好处的动效 把这个网址发给你的 Agent 安装即可： https://t.co/Bg1ziVFyeC https://t.co/fhbWMoyjZo
--- @oran_ge | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 1 | 💬 0 | 👁 435
item.author: @oran_ge

item.title:
Model page: https://t.co/zDuyTFb7XU
Try it with Codex:
ollama launch codex --model deepseek-v4-pr...
item.description:
Model page: https://t.co/zDuyTFb7XU
Try it with Codex:
ollama launch codex --model deepseek-v4-pro:cloud
Try it with OpenClaw:
ollama launch openclaw --model deepseek-v4-pro:cloud
Try it with OpenCode:
ollama launch opencode --model deepseek-v4-pro:cloud
--- @ollama | ❤️ 4 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 781
item.author: @ollama

item.title:
DeepSeek v4 Pro is now on Ollama's cloud! 🚀🚀🚀
Try it with Claude Code: ollama launch claude --model...
item.description:
DeepSeek v4 Pro is now on Ollama's cloud! 🚀🚀🚀
Try it with Claude Code: ollama launch claude --model deepseek-v4-pro:cloud
Try it with Hermes Agent: ollama launch hermes --model deepseek-v4-pro:cloud
Chat with the model: ollama run deepseek-v4-pro:cloud
🧵
--- @ollama | ❤️ 91 | 🔁 16 | 💬 12 | 👁 2634
item.author: @ollama

item.title:
这个周末最大的生产力，就是把阳台 deck 重新上漆。
三年一次的事项，总算告一段落了。 https://t.co/lgEDZaD7ib
